headline: Alvaro Arbeloa
body: 🚨 Fulham in process of closing deal to appoint Alvaro Arbeloa as new head coach - although FFC insist 2 candidates remain in contention. Proposed 3yr contract for Spaniard & staff, pending final decisions. W/ GuillermoRai_ MarioCortegana TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7349548… Link Fulham finalising deal to appoint Alvaro Arbeloa as head coach on three-year deal The west London side have been searching for a head coach since Marco Silva exited Craven Cottage for Benfica earlier this month. nytimes.com
raw_text:
🚨 Fulham in process of closing deal to appoint Alvaro Arbeloa as new head coach - although #FFC insist 2 candidates remain in contention. Proposed 3yr contract for Spaniard & staff, pending final decisions. W/ @GuillermoRai_ @MarioCortegana @TheAthleticFC nytimes.com/athletic/7349548…

Link



Fulham finalising deal to appoint Alvaro Arbeloa as head coach on three-year deal

The west London side have been searching for a head coach since Marco Silva exited Craven Cottage for Benfica earlier this month.
